item.title: Version 1.0.13
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.13

  • Product analytics SDK — 10 events captured to a local queue and batch-uploaded to our own privacy-first backend. Covers launch, activation funnel, value moments (notifications, force-poll), reliability (refresh outcome, push latency), and 5-min engagement heartbeat. No third-party trackers; events stored under our control.
  • Settings → Account → «Send anonymous usage analytics» — default ON with disclosure. Toggle off wipes the local queue instantly.
  • Fix: refresh-token rotation — the previous build only stored the new access token; the next refresh used the revoked refresh and forced a logout. Fixed — rotated refresh now persists.
  • macOS CI on GitHub Actions now runs xcodebuild build on every push; @preconcurrency on UserNotifications for SDK 15.5 compat.

item.title: Version 1.0.12
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.12

  • Backend account sync — sign in with email/password in Settings → Account, then your Claude usage syncs across devices and to the web dashboard.
  • First login offers to backfill local history (deterministic idempotency keys, safe to retry).
  • Snapshots from other devices (Windows, Chrome extension, server polling) flow back into the Mac every 15 minutes.
  • New Keep building stats when this device is offline toggle — the server polls your Claude account every ~5 min when no client is online.
  • 60s heartbeat while the app is open so the server defers to whichever client is freshest.

item.title: Version 1.0.11
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.11

  • Fix: prevent double-resume in the Claude.ai browser-session bridge under racing refreshes
  • Auth events now route through unified Sentry breadcrumbs for cleaner crash context
  • Backend URL is now overridable via CC_USAGE_BACKEND_URL env or BackendBaseURL UserDefault (default unchanged)
  • Internal refactor of AnalyticsEngine, LimitViewModel, and AppWindowCoordinator for maintainability

item.title: Version 1.0.10
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.10

  • Rebuilt Analytics dashboard — insights, weekly pacing, model mix, peak-usage windows, consistency score, source split
  • Resilient Claude.ai login — survives Cloudflare challenges via a hidden WebKit bridge and restores existing browser sessions
  • Unified user-facing errors with clear recovery steps
  • Fixed truncated "100%" label in the menu bar widget
  • Product telemetry foundation for refresh, tab and settings events

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.7

  • Removed the "Usage Insights" card from the Overview tab — signals now live in the richer Analytics tab
  • Under-the-hood refinements

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.6

  • Main window opens automatically on launch
  • Crash feedback dialog
  • Report Issue button in Settings

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
CC Usage Viewer 1.0.5

  • Auth funnel tracking
  • Extended error reporting
